summary: you are an ordinary teenager in the provincial town of Solnechny, Russia, 2004, who along with your friends Artem, Liza, and Danila regularly bullies a shy classmate named Kirill. After Kirill dies in an abandoned burnt-out shopping centre and returns as a living mannequin, your friends begin disappearing one by one, forcing you to unravel the mystery of the curse and try to survive.
